title: Recycle and Shred Event happening April 18, 2026 | Raleigh Hills Business Association
description: Our 14th Annual Recycle/Shred Event is April 18, 2026. The event hours: 9 am to Noon in the AAA Parking lot on 8555 SW Apple Way, PDX 97225 Print a Flyer Secure shred for a maximum of THREE bags or banker boxes PER vehicle. More than 3 boxes? Please make a donation to cover the cost
htmlMain:
Our 14th Annual Recycle/Shred Event is April 18, 2026. The event hours: 9 am to Noon in the AAA Parking lot on 8555 SW Apple Way, PDX 97225

Print a Flyer

Secure shred for a maximum of  THREE bags or banker boxes PER vehicle. More than 3 boxes? Please make a donation to cover the cost of  your extra-shred items. To support this event cash donations will be accepted. Use the QR code below or this link to make a donation or be a Sponsor.

WE HAVE IT COVERED!! A BIG THANK YOU for our Sponsors to generously donated toward the Shred Truck rental of $750.
